intendedUsers: Kitchen fitters and cabinet makers measuring kitchen runs and cabinet openings
Installers or workshop planners preparing panel sizes, hinge bores, order lists, and cutting plans
mainJourneys: Start or resume a project from Home
Build the kitchen run per wall in Stap 1: Indeling
Assign and review panels in Stap 2: Panelen
Verify openings and hinge drilling in Stap 3: Verificatie
Review and export order lines in Stap 4: Bestellijst
Review cutting layout and warnings in Stap 5: Zaagplan

fixedThisIteration.summary: De mobiele paneelwerkruimte gebruikt nu compactere tabs en een enkele statuskaart, waardoor het canvas en de editor merkbaar eerder de hoofdrol krijgen.

whatRemains: Geen severity 2+ issues meer in primaire flows, dichte schermen, of kritieke beslismomenten.
Alleen een low-value severity-1 aandachtspunt blijft bewust gedeferreerd: de algemene stapintro op mobiel kan nog iets korter, maar levert nu geen noemenswaardige frictie of verwarring meer op.
knownRisksChecked: dotnet test Code.slnx --nologo passes after the iteration-3 changes
dotnet publish Keuken-inmeten/Keuken-inmeten.csproj -c Release -o dist --nologo succeeds after the iteration-3 changes
npm run test:e2e passes after the iteration-3 changes
Fresh iteration-3 comparison boards confirm that the mobile paneel canvas appears materially sooner in both workspace and editor states
No regressions were found in the earlier fixed Home, Bestellijst, and mobile paneel flows
nextRecommendedStep: Stop gate is satisfied. If this work resumes later, only revisit deferred severity-1 cosmetic polish after new user evidence.
